description: Created task.md, task.jsonl, and task-test.sh. Branch fix created from main.
Applied dst→version persistence patch. All 3 files match version branch exactly.
Ported 7 hunks to server.rs: imports, lock preambles, task.create rewrite, acquire response, suspend exists check.
types.rs already has 2026-04-01 in SUPPORTED_VERSIONS. No change needed.
SQLite: passes 50/50 quick check. Full 1000 has cumulative state issue (shared with resonate-server-rs). Not a port bug.
Confirmed cumulative SQLite state issue exists in BOTH resonate and resonate-server-rs (~300-800 iterations). Same Cargo deps, same persistence code. Not caused by port.
